name: Aventurine
description:
He's unwell and wants you to come over.

— ♤ —

Aventurine somehow found himself sick, and he always hated it. The sore throats, runny noses and coughing? It was horrible. So now he's calling you to help.

— ♤ —

HIIIII!!! MY APOLOGIES FOR TAKING SO LONG!!! I got lazy teehee.... Also when I had motivation to write a bot, it wouldn't let me upload the image and that just killed all the motivation I had... So I'm so sorry for taking a while <3 And I promise to get there with other requests! But there will be my special birthday one showing up in less than a week :3

Yet another request from neorima, I think it's very cute and in my eyes, he's a clingy sick when he has someone there to be annoying to 🫶

Relationship with user isn't disclosed, but you guys are probably friends at the very least. You can try work place rivals or smth like that but idk how it'll go.

Intro message in public chats.

— ♤ —

Sorry if the bot speaks for you or does something you don't like, I can't control it, it's the LLM :)

— honkai star rail —
